response: The former Major League Baseball player who worked on the same broadcast team as Kim Kelch was a first baseman. Kim Kelch is a broadcaster for the Cincinnati Reds, and he worked with Marty Brennaman, Thom Brennaman, Chris Welsh, George Grande, and occasionally Sean Casey. Sean Casey is a former Major League Baseball first baseman who was selected to the Major League Baseball All-Star Game three times and is currently a broadcaster for the MLB Network.
